name: update-checker
description: Checks for updates to game-definition modules on app launch and on a periodic interval. Notifies via the EventBus; does NOT auto-install (the renderer prompts the user).
author: FrequencyManager Team

gameDefinitionsManifestUrl.description: URL of the JSON manifest listing all available game-definition updates.

gameModuleCheckOnBoot.description: Run a check on kernel boot.

checkIntervalHours.description: How often to re-check, in hours. Set to 0 to disable background checks.

allowPrerelease.description: Accept pre-release versions (containing a dash) in the manifest.
